'''Kar Plaushe''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] socialite [[Homeworld/Legends|from]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] who frequented the [[Outlander Club/Legends|Outlander Club]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], she visited the club at the same time the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] and [[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]] did. Shortly after in that same [[Standard year|year]], she walked in the club with a fellow socialite as the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] entered behind them, searching for Wesell.

==Biography==
Kar Plaushe was a veil-wearing [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] socialite [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] [[Coruscanti/Legends|to]]<ref name="DB" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="365Days">''[[Creating the Worlds of Star Wars: 365 Days]]''</ref> [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="DB" /> She<ref name="Gurland" /> frequented the [[Outlander Club/Legends|Outlander Club]],<ref name="DB" /> a [[Nightclub/Legends|nightclub]] and [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] hall located in the [[Uscru Entertainment District/Legends|Uscru Entertainment District]] of Coruscant,<ref name="Club">{{CSWECite|II|431|Outlander Club}}</ref> prior to the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]<ref name="DB" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="NEC" /> 

In 22 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]],<ref name="NEC Note">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of {{Film|II}} to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. The scene from ''[[Jango Fett: Bounty Hunter]]'' in which [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] is in the [[Outlander Club/Legends|Outlander Club]] takes place immediately before the film, therefore meaning it must be set in that [[Standard year/Legends|year]].</ref> she visited the club when the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] and [[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]] met there. She stood with her back turned to the<ref name="Jango Fett: Bounty Hunter">''[[Jango Fett: Bounty Hunter]]''</ref> Human [[Joshua Jinzler]].<ref name="DaG">''[[Dressing a Galaxy: The Costumes of Star Wars]]''</ref> During a [[Standard day/Legends|night]]<ref name="AoTC">{{Film|II}}</ref> shortly after in that same year,<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of {{Film|II}} to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].</ref> Plaushe, who was without a partner at the time,<ref name="Singles" /> entered the club, hand–in–hand<ref name="AoTC" /> with a fellow socialite.<ref name="Singles">{{SWArchive|url=episode-ii/explore/attack/2003/02/imageattack20030211.html|series=Image Attack|text=Coruscant Singles Scene}}</ref> Just prior to that, Wesell had ran into the club, trying to escape from the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] after an [[Plot to assassinate Senator Amidala/Legends|assassination attempt]] on [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]].<ref name="AoTC" /> Inside the club, the two socialites got to know each other.<ref name="Singles" /> While Skywalker searched the club, Plaushe walked by<ref name="AoTC" /> the [[Lorrdian/Legends|Lorrdian]] [[Seib Nod]].<ref name="Nod">{{DB|character|seibnod|Nod, Seib}}</ref>

==Personality and traits==
Plaushe was a mysterious<ref name="Gurland" /> woman who had [[Color/Legends|light]] skin<ref name="DB" /> and green [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="Gurland" /> 

==Equipment==
During her two visits to the Outlander,<ref name="AoTC" /><ref name="Jango Fett: Bounty Hunter" /> the socialite wore a black [[Clothing/Legends|top]], a jacket, a black skirt, silver heels, and a veil.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|29|Plaushe, Kar}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Kar Plaushe was created for the [[prequel trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']],<ref name="AoTC" /> which released on [[May 16]], [[2002]].<ref name="Year">''[[Star Wars Year by Year: A Visual Chronicle]]''</ref> The Outlander Club exterior scenes, which included Plaushe, were shot at [[Fox Studios, Sydney]]. The interior scenes were also shot there on [[July 17]], [[2000]].<ref name="365Days" /> Prior to the film's release, Plaushe was first pictured in "[[Casting Director Robin Gurland]]", an article published in the [[Star Wars Insider 52|fifty-second issue]] of ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine<ref name="Gurland" /> on [[February 27]], [[2001]].<ref name="GurlandDate">{{SWArchive|url=community/news/2001/02/news20010221.html|text=Star Wars Insider #52}}</ref> The character then first appeared in the young readers book ''[[Jango Fett: Bounty Hunter]]'', written by [[Eric Arnold]] and illustrated by [[Valerie Reckert]]<ref name="Jango Fett: Bounty Hunter" /> and released on [[April 23]], [[2002]].<ref name="Amazon">{{SWArchive|url=eu/lit/young/news20020225.html|text=Book Preview: Episode II Children's Books}}</ref> Plaushe first received her name in the [[2005]] reference book ''[[Dressing a Galaxy: The Costumes of Star Wars]]'', written by [[Trisha Biggar]].<ref name="DaG" />
